title: Locale Selector (0x8C)
description: Locale selector triplet layout. (Do not include triplet length or TID here.)

elements.name: LocFlgs
elements.description: Flags that specify additional syntax information (see triplet semantics).

bitDefinitions.name: Reserved/seeSpec
bitDefinitions.description: See triplet X'8C' semantics for bit definitions

elements.name: LangCode
elements.description: Language code as registered in ISO-639; encoding is UTF-16BE

elements.name: ScrptCde
elements.description: Script code as registered in ISO-15924; encoding is UTF-16BE

elements.name: RegCde
elements.description: Region code as registered in ISO-3166; encoding is UTF-16BE

elements.name: VarCde
elements.description: Variant code; encoding is UTF-16BE (optional, from offset 36 to triplet end)
